const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|search.*case|citation/i.test(x.name + " " + x.description));
text(matches);

const result = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"foreseeable pecuniary harms\" NLRB Thryv",filed_before:"2026-07-17",order_by:"score desc",num_results:10,fields:["id","caseName","dateFiled","court_citation_string","citation","absolute_url","snippet"]});
for (const c of (result?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); else if (c.type === "image") image(c); }
